query: SELECT mp.id, mp.name, mp.price, mp.pointPrice, mp.imageUrl, mp.status, mb.name as brandName, mc.name as categoryName FROM mall_products mp LEFT JOIN mall_brands mb ON mp.brandId = mb.id LEFT JOIN mall_categories mc ON mp.categoryId = mc.id WHERE mp.status = 'active' ORDER BY mp.id LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT mp.id, mp.name, mp.price, mp.pointPrice, mp.imageUrl, mp.status, mb.name as brandName, mc.name as categoryName FROM mall_products mp LEFT JOIN mall_brands mb ON mp.brandId = mb.id LEFT JOIN mall_categories mc ON mp.categoryId = mc.id WHERE mp.status = 'active' ORDER BY mp.id LIMIT 20;
